headline: AI chipmaker Cerebras namedropped by Oracle, alongside Nvidia and AMD
summary: A Cerebras deal from one of the world's top cloud providers could be a big boon for a company that's trying to hit the public market.

headline: Oracle stock jumps 10% on earnings beat and increased guidance as cloud revenue climbs 44%
summary: Oracle boosted its revenue backlog total by $30 billion during the February quarter.

headline: ANET Rises 73.3% in a Year: How Should You Play the Stock?
summary: Arista Networks' stock jumps 73% in a year on booming AI networking demand and strong cash flow, but competition, rising costs and customer concentration remain risks.

headline: Wall Street Unveils AI Winners: Arista And Ciena Lead A Multi-Billion Dollar Backbone Explosion
summary: While Nvidia gets the headlines, the companies building AI's "high-speed highways" are the real 2026 story. Discover why Arista (ANET) and Ciena (CIEN) are hiking revenue targets as Microsoft and Meta pour billions into the physical infrastructure of the future.
